--- a/train_sklearn.py
+++ b/train_sklearn.py
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+import os

+import numpy as np

+import pandas as pd

+import torch

+from sklearn.linear_model import RidgeCV

+from scipy.stats import spearmanr

+

+DATA_DIR = os.environ.get('RAB_DATA_DIR', '/data')

+EMB_PATH = 'train_val_region_embeddings_v3.pt'

+CHECKPOINT_DIR = 'checkpoints'

+os.makedirs(CHECKPOINT_DIR, exist_ok=True)

+

+def main():

+    data = torch.load(EMB_PATH, weights_only=False)

+    train_emb = data['train']

+    val_emb = data['val']

+

+    train_df = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'train.csv'))

+    val_df = pd.read_csv(os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'val.csv'))

+    train_y = train_df['target'].values

+    val_y = val_df['target'].values

+

+    mean = train_emb.mean(dim=0)

+    std = train_emb.std(dim=0).clamp(min=1e-6)

+    train_x = (train_emb - mean) / std

+    val_x = (val_emb - mean) / std

+

+    train_x_np = train_x.numpy()

+    val_x_np = val_x.numpy()

+

+    alphas = [0.01, 0.1, 1.0, 10.0, 100.0, 1000.0, 10000.0]

+

+    # Full features

+    model_full = RidgeCV(alphas=alphas, store_cv_values=False)

+    model_full.fit(train_x_np, train_y)

+    val_pred_full = model_full.predict(val_x_np)

+    val_spr_full, _ = spearmanr(val_y, val_pred_full)

+    print(f"Full features: best_alpha={model_full.alpha_}, val_spr={val_spr_full:.4f}")

+

+    # PLLD only (last 3 features)

+    model_plld = RidgeCV(alphas=alphas, store_cv_values=False)

+    model_plld.fit(train_x_np[:, -3:], train_y)

+    val_pred_plld = model_plld.predict(val_x_np[:, -3:])

+    val_spr_plld, _ = spearmanr(val_y, val_pred_plld)

+    print(f"PLLD only: best_alpha={model_plld.alpha_}, val_spr={val_spr_plld:.4f}")

+

+    # Save best based on val_spr

+    if val_spr_plld > val_spr_full:

+        print("Selecting PLLD-only model")

+        torch.save({

+            'model': model_plld,

+            'mean': mean[-3:],

+            'std': std[-3:],

+            'feature_set': 'plld',

+            'val_spr': val_spr_plld

+        }, os.path.join(CHECKPOINT_DIR, 'sklearn_model.pt'))

+    else:

+        print("Selecting full-feature model")

+        torch.save({

+            'model': model_full,

+            'mean': mean,

+            'std': std,

+            'feature_set': 'full',

+            'val_spr': val_spr_full

+        }, os.path.join(CHECKPOINT_DIR, 'sklearn_model.pt'))

+

+    # Also save PLLLD model separately for potential future ensembling

+    torch.save({

+        'model': model_plld,

+        'mean': mean[-3:],

+        'std': std[-3:],

+        'feature_set': 'plld',

+        'val_spr': val_spr_plld

+    }, os.path.join(CHECKPOINT_DIR, 'sklearn_model_plld.pt'))

+

+if __name__ == '__main__':

+    main()
